headline: S&P 500 Rises on Big Tech Bump, Corporate Profits and Oil Price Relief
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) heads into Tuesday with momentum after a powerful rebound last month in which the broader markets advanced 9%. A pullback in crude oil and first-quarter earnings beats are driving today’s gains as the markets embrace a reprieve in the Mideast escalation. headline: Coinbase Cuts 14% of Workforce in ‘AI-Native’ Pivot. The Stock Jumps.
summary: Coinbase Global  plans to slash 700 jobs, or 14% of its workforce, as the cryptocurrency exchange operator aims to cut costs and streamline its operations.  Artificial intelligence is partially to blame.  CEO Brian Armstrong said in a letter to employees that  Coinbase  remains “well-capitalized” and “well-positioned to weather any storm.”
